title: Are you staying up to date with HM Land Registry?
authors: Gavin Curry, Digital Communications and Editorial Officer

content.text: Join the thousands of conveyancers and other property professionals who have signed up to HM Land Registry’s free monthly newsletters, Landnet, Practice and Process, and our new quarterly update, Right First Time.
What are Landnet, Practice and Process, and Right First Time?
Our newsletters are designed to help you navigate the complexities of land registration with confidence, offering clear guidance, practical insight and timely updates.
Landnet keeps you up to date thanks to its concise digest of our latest news. Scan the headlines and summaries for instant insight and follow the links for more information and guidance, including:
Practice and Process is your definitive guide to changes in land registration practice. Each month it provides:

Right First Time launched this year, helping post-completion teams and administrative staff to submit error-free applications. Lively, engaging and packed with practical tips, it provides a quarterly boost to help you get applications ‘right first time’.
In a reader survey conducted soon after Practice and Process was launched, more than 90% of respondents rated Practice and Process either 4 or 5 out of 5. Readers told us it is:
How will I receive my newsletter?
Landnet – delivered on the final Wednesday of each month
Practice and Process – delivered on the second Wednesday of each month
Right First Time – delivered quarterly, with the next issue due in August
All issues arrive directly into your inbox.
Head to our subscriptions page and choose the newsletters you’d like to receive. To subscribe to Right First Time, select the 'Customer training' checkbox.
Why not encourage your colleagues to sign up, too, and help ensure everyone stays ahead of the game?
